message:
fix(lab): call mark_polled() in LabRuntime::step() to prevent false futurelocks

mark_polled() was defined on TaskRecord but never called from step(),
leaving last_polled_step at 0 for all tasks. With the default threshold
of 10,000 and panic_on_futurelock=true, any obligation-holding task
would panic after 10,001 steps even if polled every step.

Add mark_polled(self.steps) after polling the stored future. Add
regression test that runs 20 steps past a threshold of 5 and asserts
zero futurelock violations for an actively polled task.

Audit: src/lab/runtime.rs (3,798 lines) — 1 bug found, remainder SOUND.
Bead: bd-2z7je

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
